summary: Forged IAVL proof passed verifyMerkleProof on Token Hub bridge, letting attacker mint 2M BNB on BSC. Most funds frozen by validators before exit.
attack_trace: Submit handleDelegate proof using crafted IAVL leaf
Bridge accepts forged proof against historical block
Cross-mint 2M BNB on BSC, attempt to exit cross-chain
root_cause: verifyMerkleProof incorrectly trusted attacker-controlled proof path due to legacy IAVL implementation bug.
